summary: Use the real order-history list endpoint and inject required Authorization and __requestid headers.
reason: orders list used the per-order SHOW endpoint with an empty body and all /api/* calls lacked the _fbtoken Authorization header and POST idempotency header required by the web client.
validated_outcome: ordertogo-pp-cli orders list returned 58 real orders and sync --orders ingested the same 58 rows, matching the live history page for the test account.
